name: Traverse City Golf Performance Center
about: Traverse City Golf Performance Center is a comprehensive golf facility featuring an indoor Trackman Performance Center with seven simulator bays, an outdoor Trackman Range, and a short game facility with three bent grass greens. The venue provides a full-service golf shop, club fitting and repair services, and professional instruction through individual lessons, group clinics, and junior academy programs. Membership options are available, along with various event programming including a ladies league and member events, creating a hub for both serious golf practice and social play.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman technology across all practice areas (7 indoor bays, outdoor range, portable units)
Comprehensive short game practice with three new bent grass greens and chipping areas
Full-service club fitting and repair center with dedicated putter fitting options

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of on-site food service or kitchen facilities.
No mention of alcohol service; BYOB policy not specified.

simulator_hardware.notes: 7 indoor performance bays equipped with Trackman technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: It's recommended to bring your own clubs, as the venue is a practice facility and not a rental center. However, club fitting services are available to help you find the right equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: There is no mention of BYOB policies or on-site food and drink service, so it's best to contact the venue directly to confirm their policy outside catering.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a time for 18 holes. As a practice facility with simulators, play time can vary significantly depending on the number of players and simulator mode used.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers a Junior Academy program, indicating it is designed to accommodate younger golfers and families.
